# .vscode

This directory contains workspace-level Visual Studio Code settings for the repo.
Use the structure notes below to find the right file or subfolder quickly.

## Structure
- `README.md`: This guide documents the folder structure and explains what the checked-in files and subfolders are for.
- `extensions.json`: Recommended VS Code extensions for working productively in this repo.
- `settings.json`: Workspace-specific VS Code settings checked in for consistent local behavior.
